message:
test(frankenterm-core): add reverse_index_at_region_top and newline_scrolls_at_bottom fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "save_restore_roundtrip",
+  "description": "Save cursor at far position, do work elsewhere, restore and continue printing",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b333b35481b371b5b4858595a1b3851",
+  "comment": "CUP(3,5) -> (2,4), ESC 7 save, CUP home, print XYZ at row 0, ESC 8 restore -> (2,4), print Q at (2,4) with pending_wrap; cursor at (2,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "Y" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "Z" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 4, "char": "Q" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "delete_then_insert",
+  "description": "Delete chars then switch to insert mode and insert new chars",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b481b5b32501b5b34685859",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE at cols 0-4, CUP home, DCH(2) deletes AB shifting CDE left -> CDE at cols 0-2, CSI 4 h (IRM on), insert XY at col 0 -> XYCDE; cursor at (0,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "Y" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "decawm_off_in_scroll_region",
+  "description": "DECAWM off within a scroll region: chars overwrite at right margin without wrapping",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b3f376c1b5b313b33721b5b484142434445464748",
+  "comment": "CSI ? 7 l (DECAWM off), CSI 1;3 r (scroll region rows 1-3), CUP home, print ABCDE fills row 0 (5 cols), then F/G/H overwrite col 4; cursor at (0,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "H" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+{
+  "name": "irm_plus_lnm",
+  "description": "IRM and LNM enabled together: insert mode shifts chars, newline does CR+LF",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b34681b5b32306841424344451b5b48580a59",
+  "comment": "CSI 4 h (IRM on), CSI 20 h (LNM on), print ABCDE at row 0 cols 0-4, CUP home, insert X at col 0 (shifts ABCDE right -> XABCDE), LF with LNM does CR+LF to (1,0), insert Y at (1,0); cursor at (1,1)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "Y" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "scroll_region_with_autowrap",
+  "description": "Autowrap inside a scroll region wraps and scrolls within the region",
+  "initial_size": [10, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b323b34721b5b323b31484142434445464748494a4b4c",
+  "comment": "CSI 2;4 r (scroll region rows 2-4, 0-indexed 1-3), CUP(2,1) to (1,0), print ABCDEFGHIJ fills row 1 with pending_wrap, K wraps to (2,0), L at (2,1); cursor at (2,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 9, "char": "J" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "K" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 1, "char": "L" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "newline_scrolls_at_bottom",
+  "description": "Newline at bottom row scrolls the grid up, making room for new content",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b333b31484142430a44",
+  "comment": "CUP(3,1) -> (2,0), print ABC at (2,0-2) cursor at (2,3), LF at bottom row scrolls grid up: old row 0 evicted, ABC now at (1,0-2), cursor at (2,3) (LF has no CR without LNM), print D at (2,3); cursor at (2,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 3, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "delete_line_middle_of_region",
+  "description": "DL in middle of scroll region shifts content up within region, blank at bottom",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b323b3148421b5b333b3148431b5b343b3148441b5b323b34721b5b333b31481b5b4d",
+  "comment": "Print A(0,0), B(1,0), C(2,0), D(3,0); CSI 2;4 r (region rows 1-3); CUP(3,1) -> (2,0) middle of region; DL(1) deletes row 2, D moves up to (2,0), blank at (3,0); cursor at (2,0)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "sgr_bold_italic_verified",
+  "description": "SGR bold+italic applied to cells, then reset; verify attrs on individual cells",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b313b336d41421b5b306d4344",
+  "comment": "CSI 1;3 m (bold+italic), print AB (bold+italic), CSI 0 m (reset), print CD (no attrs); cursor at (0,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bold": true, "italic": true } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B", "attrs": { "bold": true, "italic": true } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C", "attrs": {} },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D", "attrs": {} }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "pending_wrap_cleared_by_cup",
+  "description": "CUP clears pending_wrap and repositions cursor; next print at new position",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b313b334858",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE fills row 0 (pending_wrap), CUP(1,3) -> (0,2) clears pending_wrap, print X overwrites C at (0,2); cursor at (0,3)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 3 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "pending_wrap_cleared_by_move",
+  "description": "Cursor movement clears pending_wrap; next print overwrites last column",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b4146",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE fills 5-col row 0 (pending_wrap set), CUP Up(1) clears pending_wrap but row stays 0, print F overwrites col 4; cursor at (0,4) with pending_wrap",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "F" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
